title: penstemon fruticiformis var. incertus
intro: Penstemon fruticiformis var. incertus, also known as the Rocky Mountain beardtongue, is a perennial plant species native to the mountains of Colorado in the United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Penstemon fruticiformis var. incertus include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe wounds and reduce fever. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties, and it may also be used in tinctures and salves.
